task.name: Delta & Incremental Compute Research
task.description: Explore delta/incremental compute, reusable computation, and proof-based verification with near-term FinOps/ETL applications; produce actionable findings for Northroot’s pilot priorities.

context.summary: Northroot emits canonical receipts for compute steps. Delta compute reuses verified work across runs; decisions record J, α, C_id, C_comp in proofs. This task finds high-ROI domains, operators, and research backing.

conceptual: Map algebraic strategies for partial reuse (monoids, semirings, differential dataflow).
Define operator incrementality (α) and break-even thresholds.
Survey overlap metrics (Jaccard, MinHash, weighted similarity).
technical: Survey OSS frameworks (Bazel, DVC, Dagster, Ray, Differential Dataflow, Delta Lake).
Rank operators by incrementality (group-by, join, partition, aggregate).
applied: Identify high-ROI domains (FinOps, ETL, AI agents, feature stores).
Map integration paths: SDK hooks, MCP embedding, trace observation.
market: Estimate market size/spend for FinOps and ETL workflows.
Survey competitors/adjacent systems; identify whitespace for verifiable reuse proofs.
frontier: Cross-org delta with privacy (MPC, federated, ZK).
Learned cost models for delta decisions.
TEE/ZK proof feasibility for verifiable compute.

deliverables.name: landscape_brief
deliverables.description: Overview of delta/incremental compute research, frameworks, trends.

deliverables.name: applied_use_case_sheets
deliverables.description: One-pagers: pain points, reuse ops, expected ROI per domain.

deliverables.name: operator_strategy_table
deliverables.description: Operators ranked by α and savings potential.

deliverables.name: integration_notes
deliverables.description: SDK/API integration strategies for real systems.

methodology: Collect quantitative case metrics (FinOps, ETL, ML).
Prototype delta-aware workloads; measure J and α.

short_term: FinOps pilot for cost attribution reuse receipts.
medium_term: Canonical schema alignment for heterogeneous data.
Performance baselines for canonicalization and chunking.

guidelines: Reference spec sections or engine components.

ultimate_goal: Evidence-backed roadmap for verifiable delta compute: where to deliver immediate savings, which operators/domains to target, and research direction for cross-org reuse.
